programme.title: Give Me Shelter - Film
programme.desc: Celebrities are on a mission to save animals caught in the crosshairs of human arrogance and greed.

programme.title: Extinction Soup
programme.desc: Extinction Soup is a documentary about the ground-breaking efforts to stop the international trade of shark fins. The story follows filmmaker Philip Waller on his quest to document the efforts of conservationist Stefanie Brendl, founder of Shark Allies, as she fights to educate lawmakers and helps pass legislation that will ban the trade of fins and the consumption of shark fin soup - the driving force behind the slaughter of millions of sharks every year.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Minisodes - Canyoning, Jet Ski Free Ride, and Feeding Stingrays
programme.desc: The Deap Canyoning Team defies logic as they leap from high cliffs into deep canyon pools. This realatively new extreme sport called Canyoning, is breathtaking and spectacular viewing!

programme.title: Xplash Ep107
programme.desc: Xplash brings you spectacular water-related action from around the globe. Today we'll catch some big-air freestyle kitesurfing in the Canary Islands, bodysurf giant waves in Ireland, go whitewater kayaking in Iceland and check out Hydro Flight at the Poseidon Games in Australia.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep109: Whale Sharks, Feeding Frenzies, and Great White Sharks.
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV studies Whale Sharks kept in a giant tank and then takes a Deeper Dive by explaining shark hearing, shark feeding frenzies and Great White Sharks.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep103: V8 Jet Sprinting Superboat Championships
programme.desc: Hot Water showcases the world’s best in adrenalized water-related motorsports. This episode features Round 3 of Jet Sprinting from Cabarita in New South Wales, Australia. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep806 Paddling the Madawaska River - Ontario, Canada
programme.desc: For the first time ever, host Ken Whiting trades his whitewater kayak for a whitewater canoe on the Madawaska River.

programme.title: Xplash Ep108
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. In this episode, we’ll witness the underwater mastery of free-diver and current World Record holder, Arnaud Jerald; dive into a shark tank with BMX Pro Kriss Kyle; and meet some fearless shark divers.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep112: Deep White - Why Sharks Attack
programme.desc: Deep White explores ways to research sharks to determine why sharks attack and to study innovative ways to train sharks in order to prevent future attacks. Sharks are surprisingly intelligent and able to perform complex tasks. Sharks can distinguish different signals and cues in feeding routines and they develop strong bonds with their trainers.

programme.title: Sportsman's Adventures: Islamorada Permit and Bones in the Florida Keys, USA
programme.desc: Captain Rick Murphy heads to Islamorada in the Florida Keys to fish for bonefish and permit with Captain Mark Krowka.

programme.title: Blue World Ep502: Muck Diving in Florida + Iceland…The World's Clearest Water
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bird travels to Iceland to investigate a giant crack in the ground filled with frigid runoff from melting glaciers. It’s rumored to be the clearest water in the world. Next, he heads to sunny Florida, not to dive a coral reef or a spectacular shipwreck, but to dive in shallow, murky water under a busy bridge. This secret spot is home to some of the ocean’s most remarkable, and strange, creatures.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Attunga - A Higher Place
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of three Norwegian snowboarders: legendary purist Terje Haakonsen, holistic-minded Torgeir Bergrem, and carefree wunderkind Marcus Kleveland. Watch as filmmaker and snowboarder Seth Huot pulls back the curtain to examine their common purpose, potential, pitfalls, and paychecks.

programme.title: Artist Profile - José Medeles
programme.desc: For most artists, music is a way of life. On this episode of the Artist Profile series, we follow José Medeles through a day in the life as he shares his journey from La Salle, Illinois to touring with The Breeders, to founding the Revival Drum Shop and making music as one half of 1939 Ensemble.

programme.title: Marmoset Presents: Bridge City Revival
programme.desc: Bridge City Revival is the acclaimed music collective from Portland, Oregon. Inspired by the soulful 60s, BCR was raised on The Chi-Lites, Otis Redding, Isley Brothers, Lee Fields, and Sharon Jones. Banger drum breaks. Driving bass. Rhythmic guitar. Rolling keyboards. Soulful brass. That’s BCR!

programme.title: Artist Profile - WebsterX
programme.desc: In this episode, we focus our cameras on the hip-hop artist WebsterX as he prepares for his hometown performance at the summer TDM Festival in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. FIlmed by Josh Brine and Kale Chesney.

programme.title: Visitations - La Sera: Devil’s Hearts Grow Gold
programme.desc: La Sera performing "Devils Hearts Grow Gold" at Room 205. A few days before embarking on their first UK tour, mastermind Katy Goodman (vox/bass), Jennifer Prince (guitar/vox), and Jonathan Weil (drums), stopped by to blast through a few songs from Katy's upcoming full-length on Hardly Art.

programme.title: Visitations - La Sera: Never Come Around
programme.desc: La Sera performing 'Never Come Around' at Room 205. A few days before embarking on their first UK tour, La Sera stopped by Room 205 to play songs from the band’s upcoming LP on Hardly Art. The project's inspiration springs from an attraction to ethereal choral vocals and pop hits of the 1950's.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Lay Down Your Weapons
programme.desc: “Lay Down Your Weapons” is a respite from the cacophony of the world. Atoms and Void is musician Arlie Carstens, of Seattle’s Juno, and producer Eric Fisher. Known for his skateboarding films, Director Greg Hunt here lets landscapes and cityscapes slowly unfold. Breathe deeply, watch and listen.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Waves Of Blood
programme.desc: The core of Atoms and Void is formed in the friendship and songwriting partnership of Arlie Carstens and Eric Fisher. “Waves of Blood” features cartwheeling post-rock guitars, buoyant bass, and double-drummers bashing away like shutters in a hurricane. Good for long walks and red-eye flights.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - This Departing Landscape
programme.desc: Atoms and Void is formed in the songwriting partnership of Arlie Carstens and Eric Fisher. The video for the song, “This Departing Landscape,” is an awkwardly beautiful collection of footage from years of touring and recording, proving the maxim, “life is about the journey, not the destination.”

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Golden Shivers
programme.desc: Atoms and Void is formed in the songwriting partnership of Arlie Carstens and Eric Fisher. “Golden Shivers” is a beautiful piece of ambient electronic music akin to the works of minimalist composers Steve Reich and Meredith Monk. Good for running, dancing, driving, and doing the dishes. Play loud.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Futureproof
programme.desc: In shred world, Absinthe Films’ "Futureproof" is widely regarded as a stone cold classic. This movie showcases iconic performances from many of the best riders to ever do it, including Romain De Marchi, JP Solberg, Trevor Andrew Wolfgang Nyvelt and Gigi Rüf.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Kimmy Fasani
programme.desc: Over the course of her career, snowboarder Kimmy Fasani has won the coveted “Women’s Rider of The Year Award” from TransWorld Snowboarding Magazine, and the “Women’s Video Part of The Year Award” from Snowboarder Magazine. This fascinating documentary captures Fasani’s first time riding in Alaska.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Brandon Cocard
programme.desc: An early morning of magic in Haines, Alaska with the Absinthe Films crew. Featuring: Brandon Cocard Kimmy Fasani, Nicolas Müller

programme.title: Echo Chamber
programme.desc: In 2020, Brandon Cocard dropped “Echo Chamber,” featuring cameos from Miles Fallon, Kazu Kokubo, Taylor Elliott, Brendon Rego, Kevin Backstrom, Mike Rav, Kaede Yasunaga, Keisuke Yoshida and Chris Beresford. Filmed in Hokkaido, Japan and Salt Lake City, Utah by Sam Tuor. Music by Cocard and friends.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Kimmy Fasani
programme.desc: Over the course of her career, snowboarder Kimmy Fasani has won the coveted “Women’s Rider of The Year Award” from TransWorld Snowboarding Magazine, and the “Women’s Video Part of The Year Award” from Snowboarder Magazine. This fascinating documentary captures Fasani’s first time riding in Alaska.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Brandon Cocard
programme.desc: An early morning of magic in Haines, Alaska with the Absinthe Films crew. Featuring: Brandon Cocard Kimmy Fasani, Nicolas Müller

programme.title: Echo Chamber
programme.desc: In 2020, Brandon Cocard dropped “Echo Chamber,” featuring cameos from Miles Fallon, Kazu Kokubo, Taylor Elliott, Brendon Rego, Kevin Backstrom, Mike Rav, Kaede Yasunaga, Keisuke Yoshida and Chris Beresford. Filmed in Hokkaido, Japan and Salt Lake City, Utah by Sam Tuor. Music by Cocard and friends.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Nippow Holiday
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen invites the filmmaker and musician, Leo Cittadella, to join him and Rip Zinger on a powder trip to Hokkaido, Japan. Along the way, they meet up with Nicolas Müller and Mikkel Bang to film for the Absinthe Films feature "TurboDojo.”

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo One
programme.desc: On his 45th trip to Japan (since 1991), Terje rides powder in the Japanese Alps with the snowboarders Leo Cittadella, Rip Zinger, Curtis Ciszek, Oli Gittler and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Two
programme.desc: The snowboarders Rip Zinger and Terje Haakonsen ride powder in Japan. Years after his recovery from a debilitating head injury, they get Kevin Pearce back on snow. Join us for this episode of friendship, freshies, and freeriding.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Three
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen explores the joys of Japanese mountain culture with his friends Kevin Pearce, Mikkel Bang, Rip Zinger, Oli Gittler, Curtis Ciszek, Leo Cittadella and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Relax If You Can
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen and Leo Cittadella go snowskating at the vast Austrian ski resort of Ischgl. While enjoying a timeout along the Swiss-Austrian border, they discuss European cultural differences and similarities.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Half Banked at Mt Baker
programme.desc: Terje and Leo Cittadella head to Mt. Baker, Washington to meet up with with Russell Winfield and Rip Zinger to compete in the 33rd Legendary Banked Slalom. During a windstorm, a tree falls on the house while everyone is asleep. Terje gets waxing tips from Olympic gold medalist Seth Westcott.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Attunga - A Higher Place
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of three Norwegian snowboarders: legendary purist Terje Haakonsen, holistic-minded Torgeir Bergrem, and carefree wunderkind Marcus Kleveland. Watch as filmmaker and snowboarder Seth Huot pulls back the curtain to examine their common purpose, potential, pitfalls, and paychecks.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: NowHere
programme.desc: A 2010 winter journey with riders facing harsh conditions and deeper questions. This Absinthe Films documentary explores perception, purpose, and the fine line between feeling lost and finding where you truly belong.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 7

It is also the 2nd most indented island in all of the Adriatic Sea, with gorgeous beaches and beautiful nature we believe is worth exploring completely. Come join us in this new adventure!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8
programme.desc: Welcome to Sail-Ho Croatia! We're in Rab, the island known by many as the island of love and happiness since Roman times. It has more than 30 sandy beaches, 2500 hours of sunshine and a mouthwatering gastronomy. Come join us and find out why this place is considered a happy place by so many!

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we are travelling to the other side of the world for the second act of the Kitefoil World Series to see if Toni Vodisek can keep up with his great performance beating and second fleet after Gizzeria. The 19-year-old Slovenian has secured his first regatta on the professional kite racing circuit. Will he beat the lead from Axel Mazella?

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: In this episode we are taking a domestic flight to the east coast of Fujian Province, Pingtan, for the Kitefoil World Series. The long sandy beaches and good weather conditions are placing Pingtan second most touristic island of China and if you combine its good winds, Pingtan makes perfect venue for Kiteboarding!

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: When God Says Let Go
programme.desc: Is your faith being tested? If you’ve been waiting on the details of what God has next, remember that God doesn’t give a test without a lesson first, so if He’s calling you to let go of something, you can trust He’s already provided you with what you’ll need to take that step.

programme.title: This Might Be My God Moment
programme.desc: Are you standing over a situation that’s too big for you? If you feel like your hope, logic, and options are at a dead end, pay attention because this might be your “my God moment.”

programme.title: All Those Times You Didn’t See
programme.desc: The efforts you make when no one’s watching are the ones God uses to shape you. Just because you don't see the outcome yet doesn’t mean He’s ignoring you; He's positioning you. Keep showing up while you wait.

programme.title: All You've Got To Do Is Don't
programme.desc: We all find ourselves in seasons when we feel like we don’t have what it takes, and we don’t know what to do. But don’t be afraid or discouraged, because God isn’t late — He’s working according to His timing. Don’t lose hope, and don’t give up

programme.title: The God Of Pieces
programme.desc: The devil wants to keep you overwhelmed by your situation, but God wants to show you how to deal with it piece by piece. And as you learn to praise God for the piece you have, you’ll experience the peace you’ve been praying for.

programme.title: I Thought It Was Through
programme.desc: When despair sets in, it’s easy to assume it’ll always be this way. But what if a shift in thinking could break that cycle? Your thoughts have the power to disrupt your despair, especially when you stop focusing on what happened and start trusting the God who never left you.

programme.title: Vecinos del Terror
programme.desc: Por accidente se les dispara un arma con el impacto matan al cuñado quien después regresa de ultratumba a cobrar venganza y ni la policía se escapa de la venganza de ultratumba

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños asesinatos están ocurriendo en la ciudad. Una investigadora de lo paranormal y un detective privado se dedican a indagar en el caso y lo que encontraran será algo que nunca imaginaron.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: El Sonido de los Tulipanes
programme.desc: En Buenos Aires durante la crisis del 2001, Marcelo un escritor devenido en periodista, debe volver sobre los últimos pasos de su padre Tonio un consagrado intelectual de quien se encuentra profundamente distanciado cuando muere en condiciones extrañas. De la mano de Carolina la ex secretaria de su padre, Marcelo se sumerge en un mundo oscuro lleno de violencia y ambiciones de poder enfrentándose a “El Loco” Bertolini. Pero el peligro no solo lo acechará a él sino también a los suyos. ¿Podrá Marcelo encontrar los verdaderos motivos de la muerte de su padre?

programme.title: El Desertor
programme.desc: Luego de ser reclutado para el servicio militar y ante los abusos de su jefe inmediato, el Subteniente Montilla, Julián escapa del cuartel, lo que provoca una feroz persecución por parte de Montilla, quien se ha enamorado de Sagrario y hará todo lo posible para separar a los jóvenes.

programme.title: El Tercer Deseo
programme.desc: Eugenio, un corredor de bienes raíces despierta en una esquina de la ciudad con una descomunal borrachera y descubre cerca una desportillada tetera de metal. La toma y manosea a ver si es de plata y, de pronto, se le aparece el espectro de un duende que le sugiere formule tres deseos. El genio desaparece sin dar oportunidad al tercer deseo. Mas tarde, descubre que los deseos le han sido concedidos pero de forma equivocada. La vida de Eugenio se complica, solo anhela reencontrar la tetera abandonada y pedir el tercer deseo.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento. Una historia no previsible que juega al despiste, por lo que, hay que esperar hasta el final para saber lo que está pasando la protagonista.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.desc: En Martí Noticias News te traemos las últimas novedades globales, ofreciendo una cobertura y análisis en profundidad de los temas más apremiantes.
